perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young male performer with brown hair and arm tattoos stands in a studio setting, wearing a black oversized t-shirt, a heavy silver chain necklace, and professional Sony MDR-7506 headphones. He is positioned in front of a condenser microphone with a pop filter, set against a dark green curtain background. (2) As the song progresses, his facial expressions intensify, frequently closing his eyes and using wide hand gestures to emphasize the emotional weight of the lyrics. (3) During the instrumental bridge, he shifts from singing to energetic, slightly comedic movements, darting his eyes around and adjusting his sleeves while keeping time with the rock music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male vocal singing a Hokkien rock ballad in a passionate, slightly raspy tone. The BGM consists of melodic piano and a steady drum beat. (2) The vocal intensity increases in the chorus, with the singer reaching higher notes and expressing deep emotion. (3) A high-energy electric guitar solo enters, accompanied by fast-paced drumming and bass, transitioning the soundscape into hard rock. No vocals are present during this instrumental section.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom center: "底這個台北 無人欲聽我的心聲" (In this Taipei, no one wants to hear my heart's voice) - Tone: Melancholic. (2) Functional Text: "生份的傷心變作 一條條的歌" (Unfamiliar sadness becomes songs) - Tone: Reflective. (3) Functional Text: Subsequent lyrics like "我怨嘆這個 無情無義的社會" (I lament this heartless society) - Tone: Resentful/Intense.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Emotional singing performance transitioning into an energetic instrumental dance segment.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male performer throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young male with a modern hairstyle, arm tattoos, wearing a black oversized t-shirt and a chunky silver chain.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dark green or teal pleated curtain serves as a consistent backdrop, with a warm lamp visible in the background during some shots.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Studio lighting with a warm side accent.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Smooth progression from ballad to rock.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-quality musical cover performance designed to showcase the singer's vocal range and emotional delivery. It aims to resonate with audiences through the melancholic and rebellious themes of the Hokkien rock song, while adding a personal flair through the performer's visual style and energetic movements during the guitar solo.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of Sony professional headphones, commonly used in studio environments.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy chain necklace and tattooed arms, blending 'street' aesthetic with studio music performance.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a popular style of Taiwanese social media content where influencers cover classic or modern Hokkien hits with professional production values.
